instruction: Implement clamp(x, lo, hi): return x constrained to the range [lo, hi] — lo if x < lo, hi if x > hi, otherwise x. clamp(5, 0, 10) == 5, clamp(-3, 0, 10) == 0, clamp(99, 0, 10) == 10.

files.clamp.py:
def clamp(x, lo, hi):
    raise NotImplementedError
files.test_clamp.py:
from clamp import clamp


def test_clamp():
    assert clamp(5, 0, 10) == 5
    assert clamp(-3, 0, 10) == 0
    assert clamp(99, 0, 10) == 10
